evals.name: backend-task-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task to the correct agent: 'Implement a new REST API endpoint POST /api/v1/orders that validates request body, writes to PostgreSQL, and returns 201 on success.'
expectations: Should select backend-architect agent for API/database task
Confidence score should be >= 0.85 for clear backend task
Should explain why backend-architect was selected
Should not suggest multiple agents for a clearly backend task

evals.name: fallback-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task: 'Review the overall project architecture, assess technical debt across all modules, and create a refactoring roadmap.'
expectations: Should fallback to tech-lead for cross-cutting architectural concerns
Should explain why tech-lead is the fallback choice
Should not invent agent names not in the registry
